description: Streetlights not working for a week. Risky for children playing in the evening.
Large accumulation of garbage near the gate. Stray dogs causing issues.
Open drain causing foul smell and health hazard for shopkeepers.
Heavy dust due to coal trucks. Resident requested regular water sprinkling.
Multiple potholes on the access road to the college. Biker fell yesterday.
Water logging in front of the hospital gate after moderate rain.

location: Path leading to Hinglaj Mata Mandir
description: Broken steps and lack of lighting on the temple approach path.
Damaged water pipeline leaking for two days. Drinking water being wasted.
Overhanging tree branches touching electric wires. Risk of short circuit.
Encroachment by temporary stalls blocking the footpath.
Stray cattle roaming on the main road causing traffic delays.
Garbage bins overflowing after the weekend festival crowd.
Sewer line blockage leading to water backing up in the residential lane.
Illegal dumping of construction debris on the vacant plot.
Road surface severely damaged due to heavy mining machinery movement.
